name: BigCommerce
description: BigCommerce is a hosted e-commerce platform for building and operating online stores.

auth_methods.note: Official docs describe two primary auth methods: OAuth 2.0 for apps and Store API Accounts which provide client_id and access token headers (X-Auth-Client, X-Auth-Token) for API calls — mapped here to 'oauth2' and to 'api_key'/'token' respectively.

credential_access.note: Developer Guide shows registering as a developer and creating apps; testing/installing apps requires a BigCommerce store and the docs reference using a trial store for testing (i.e., API credentials can be obtained by a developer using a store/trial control panel).

api_surface.note: Official API Reference documents both the Store Management REST APIs (manage products, customers, orders, etc.) and the Storefront GraphQL API; the coverage includes core store objects indicating broad coverage.

buildability.note: Public API reference and developer guides exist and API credentials can be created from a store control panel (trial available). You need a BigCommerce store (trial suffices) to create Store API Accounts or to install and test OAuth apps.

queries: How to create Store API Account BigCommerce control panel
